parameters.query:
SELECT 
  id,
  topic,
  target_keyword,
  city,
  loan_product,
  content_type,
  source_reason,
  priority_score,
  status
FROM seo_content_topics
WHERE status = 'pending'
ORDER BY priority_score DESC, id ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  id,
  lender_name,
  product_type,
  loan_category,
  city,
  city_allowed,
  cities_allowed,
  city_coverage,
  property_types,
  property_allowed,
  min_roi,
  max_roi,
  roi_min,
  roi_max,
  interest_rate_start,
  max_ltv,
  ltv_max_overall,
  ltv_sorp,
  ltv_socp,
  ltv_soip,
  ltv_land,
  min_cibil,
  cibil_policy,
  max_loan_amount,
  loan_max_lakh,
  income_types,
  income_types_allowed,
  profile_allowed,
  programs,
  surrogate_banking,
  surrogate_gst,
  surrogate_itr,
  surrogate_rtr,
  surrogate_low_ltv,
  surrogate_lip,
  title_jda,
  title_rhb,
  title_society_patta,
  title_society_patta_year,
  title_gram_panchayat,
  title_nagar_nigam,
  title_riico,
  geo_limit,
  geo_limit_km,
  processing_fee_pct,
  processing_fee_flat,
  notes,
  rag_text,
  searchable_text,
  updated_at
FROM lenders_products
WHERE 
  is_active = 1
  AND (
    city_allowed LIKE CONCAT('%', '{{ $json.city }}', '%')
    OR cities_allowed LIKE CONCAT('%', '{{ $json.city }}', '%')
    OR city_coverage LIKE CONCAT('%', '{{ $json.city }}', '%')
    OR city LIKE CONCAT('%', '{{ $json.city }}', '%')
    OR city_allowed IS NULL
    OR cities_allowed IS NULL
    OR city_coverage IS NULL
  )
  AND (
    product_type LIKE CONCAT('%', '{{ $json.loan_product }}', '%')
    OR product LIKE CONCAT('%', '{{ $json.loan_product }}', '%')
    OR products_supported LIKE CONCAT('%', '{{ $json.loan_product }}', '%')
    OR loan_category LIKE CONCAT('%', '{{ $json.loan_product }}', '%')
    OR searchable_text LIKE CONCAT('%', '{{ $json.loan_product }}', '%')
    OR rag_text LIKE CONCAT('%', '{{ $json.loan_product }}', '%')
  )
ORDER BY 
  COALESCE(roi_min, min_roi, interest_rate_start, 99) ASC,
  COALESCE(ltv_max_overall, max_ltv, 0) DESC
LIMIT 8;

parameters.jsCode:
const r = $json;

function sqlEscape(value) {
  if (value === null || value === undefined) return 'NULL';
  return "'" + String(value)
    .replace(/\\/g, '\\\\')
    .replace(/'/g, "\\'")
    .replace(/\0/g, '\\0')
    .replace(/\n/g, '\\n')
    .replace(/\r/g, '\\r')
    .replace(/\x1a/g, '\\Z') + "'";
}

const insertSql = `
INSERT INTO content_queue (
  content_type,
  topic,
  target_keyword,
  city,
  loan_product,
  source_table,
  source_record_ids,
  title,
  meta_title,
  meta_description,
  slug,
  content_long,
  content_short,
  hashtags,
  cta,
  image_prompt,
  status,
  ai_score,
  compliance_notes,
  created_by
) VALUES (
  ${sqlEscape(r.content_type)},
  ${sqlEscape(r.topic)},
  ${sqlEscape(r.target_keyword)},
  ${sqlEscape(r.city)},
  ${sqlEscape(r.loan_product)},
  ${sqlEscape(r.source_table)},
  ${sqlEscape(r.source_record_ids)},
  ${sqlEscape(r.title)},
  ${sqlEscape(r.meta_title)},
  ${sqlEscape(r.meta_description)},
  ${sqlEscape(r.slug)},
  ${sqlEscape(r.content_long)},
  ${sqlEscape(r.content_short)},
  ${sqlEscape(r.hashtags)},
  ${sqlEscape(r.cta)},
  ${sqlEscape(r.image_prompt)},
  ${sqlEscape(r.status)},
  ${Number(r.ai_score || 0)},
  ${sqlEscape(r.compliance_notes)},
  'n8n'
)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  topic = VALUES(topic),
  target_keyword = VALUES(target_keyword),
  city = VALUES(city),
  loan_product = VALUES(loan_product),
  source_table = VALUES(source_table),
  source_record_ids = VALUES(source_record_ids),
  title = VALUES(title),
  meta_title = VALUES(meta_title),
  meta_description = VALUES(meta_description),
  content_long = VALUES(content_long),
  content_short = VALUES(content_short),
  hashtags = VALUES(hashtags),
  cta = VALUES(cta),
  image_prompt = VALUES(image_prompt),
  status = 'needs_review',
  ai_score = VALUES(ai_score),
  compliance_notes = VALUES(compliance_notes),
  updated_at = NOW();
`;

return {
  json: {
    ...r,
    insert_sql: insertSql
  }
};

parameters.query:
UPDATE seo_content_topics
SET status = 'generated',
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $('Build Content Queue Row').first().json.topic_id }};
